overview: A high-converting, professional website for Sodhi Physiotherapy Clinic in Mansa, Punjab, India — featuring a hero with appointment CTAs, 6 service offerings, trust signals, patient testimonials, and a full contact section with Google Maps and WhatsApp integration.
features: Hero section with 'Book Appointment Now' and WhatsApp CTAs
6 detailed service pages: Back Pain, Cervical Pain, Knee Pain, Sports Injuries, Slip Disc/Sciatica, Shockwave Therapy
Why Choose Us section with advanced equipment highlights
About section with BPT credentials and trust signals
Contact section with clickable phone numbers, Google Maps embed, and WhatsApp button
Sticky navigation with mobile hamburger menu
White and blue medical-professional design theme
SEO-optimized headings and meta tags for local search
